description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named .NET that builds and tests a .NET project on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up .NET 7.0.x, restores dependencies, builds the project, runs tests, and publishes the project for multiple platforms (win-x64, win-x86, linux-x64, linux-arm, osx-x64) with a version number based on the current time and run number.
